subTitle: Ask us anything about FixSoft and our products.

faqs.question: What services does FixSoft offer?
faqs.answer: FixSoft provides professional web development, Android and iOS mobile apps, desktop software, custom enterprise systems, and ready-made SaaS products. We also offer hosting and ongoing technical support.

faqs.question: What is FixSoftRepair?
faqs.answer: FixSoftRepair is our all-in-one repair shop management system. It covers customer and device management, inventory and spare parts, repair tracking, invoicing, staff and payroll management, installment sales, and more.

faqs.question: Which types of repair businesses can use FixSoftRepair?
faqs.answer: FixSoftRepair is designed for all types of repair shops including phone repair, car repair, electronics repair, motor repair, and any other maintenance service business.

faqs.question: Can I get a custom software solution for my business?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. FixSoft specializes in building custom software tailored to your exact business needs. Contact our team to discuss your project and get a personalized quote.

faqs.question: What kind of support do you provide?
faqs.answer: All our products and projects come with dedicated technical support. FixSoftRepair subscribers get email and chat support, with priority response times on the Professional plan.

faqs.question: How do I get started with FixSoft?
faqs.answer: Simply contact us through our contact page or request a demo of FixSoftRepair. Our team will guide you through the options and find the best solution for your business.
